narrative:
Dublin City  city has 35,751 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a clear Republican lean of 10.4 percentage points.
